title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: MILWAUKIE-OAK GROVE HEALTH CENTER OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Program oversees a statewide network of certified health care providers to ensure access to a suite of reproductive health services including preventive reproductive health care, preconception and contraception. Services include annual gynecological exams (including pap tests, breast exams and STI screening); pregnancy testing; birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception, abortion referrals; and more. Vasectomy services provided at this site. Provides medication based abortion only (up to 11 weeks) and no surgical abortion provided at this site. 14411 SE McLoughlin Boulevard Milwaukie, OR 97267 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% federal poverty level Hours: Tuesday 11am-7pm, Wednesday noon-7pm, Thursday/Friday/Saturday 8am-4pm Email (888) 875-7820 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (888) 875-7820 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Abortions Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Sterilization * Men Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - INFO FOR TEENS HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TRANSGENDER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MILWAUKIE-OAK GROVE HEALTH CENTER
